# AI Video Picks

> Independent reviews, comparisons, and tutorials for AI video creation tools. Updated weekly.

## About

AI Video Picks (aivideopicks.com) publishes hands-on reviews of AI-powered video generation, editing, and avatar platforms. Every review includes real feature testing, pricing breakdowns, pros/cons analysis, and side-by-side comparisons. The site covers 32 AI video tools across 34 articles with honest ratings and affiliate links disclosed per FTC guidelines. Content is written for creators, marketers, and businesses evaluating AI video tools.

## Reviews (16)

- [Movavi Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/movavi-review-2026.html): AI-enhanced video editor review covering timeline editing, AI tools, effects, and export options. Beginner-friendly with affordable pricing.
- [HeyGen Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/heygen-review-2026.html): AI avatar platform review covering Avatar IV, video translation, voice cloning, and interactive avatars. Rating: 8.5/10. From $24/month.
- [Synthesia Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/synthesia-review-2026.html): Enterprise AI avatar video platform with 230+ avatars, 140+ languages, and SOC 2 compliance. From $22/month.
- [DeepBrain AI Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/deepbrain-ai-review-2026.html): AI Studios avatar platform with ChatGPT script assistant, custom avatars, and document-to-video. Rating: 7.8/10. From $24/month.
- [Runway Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/runway-review-2026.html): AI video generator featuring Gen-3 Alpha text-to-video, image-to-video, and motion brush tools. From $12/month.
- [Fliki Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/fliki-review-2026.html): Text-to-video platform with 75+ languages, AI voices, and blog-to-video conversion. From $28/month.
- [Descript Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/descript-review-2026.html): AI video editor with text-based editing, filler word removal, Studio Sound, and overdub voice cloning. From $24/month.
- [Pictory Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/pictory-review-2026.html): AI video maker for script-to-video, blog-to-video, and auto-captions. From $19/month.
- [InVideo Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/invideo-review-2026.html): Template-based AI video maker with 5,000+ templates, iStock footage, and AI script generator. From $25/month.
- [Colossyan Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/colossyan-review-2026.html): Enterprise AI avatar platform for training and L&D with branching scenarios and SCORM export. From $21/month.
- [Opus Clip Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/opus-clip-review-2026.html): AI clip repurposing tool that turns long videos into viral shorts with AI virality scoring. From $19/month.
- [Murf AI Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/murf-ai-review-2026.html): AI voiceover platform with 200+ voices, voice cloning, and video sync capabilities. From $23/month.
- [Zebracat Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/zebracat-review-2026.html): AI video ad creation tool for social media with AI scripts and stock footage. From $25/month.
- [Vidnoz Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/vidnoz-review-2026.html): Free AI avatar video maker with 1,000+ avatars, talking photos, and video translation. Free tier available.
- [Submagic Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/submagic-review-2026.html): AI captions and short-form video tool with auto-captions, B-roll generation, and eye contact correction. From $9/month.
- [ElevenLabs Review 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/elevenlabs-review-2026.html): AI voice generator review covering text-to-speech, voice cloning, dubbing, and pricing.

## Comparisons (11)

- [Best AI Video Tools 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/best-ai-video-tools-2026.html): Top 10 AI video tools ranked with pricing table, ratings, and use-case recommendations.
- [Best AI Talking Head Tools 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/best-ai-talking-head-tools-2026.html): 7 best AI talking head video tools ranked — HeyGen, Synthesia, D-ID, Colossyan, DeepBrain AI, Vidnoz, Fliki. Avatar counts, pricing, and use cases.
- [HeyGen vs Synthesia 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/heygen-vs-synthesia-2026.html): Head-to-head comparison of the two leading AI avatar platforms across avatars, voices, pricing, and API.
- [HeyGen vs Synthesia vs Pictory](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/heygen-vs-synthesia-vs-pictory.html): Three-way comparison for avatar-based video creation covering features, pricing, and best use cases.
- [Kling vs Veo vs Runway](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/kling-vs-veo-vs-runway.html): Best AI video generators compared on output quality, motion realism, and pricing.
- [VEED vs Kapwing vs Descript](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/veed-vs-kapwing-vs-descript.html): Online video editors compared for solo creators and teams.
- [D-ID vs Elai vs HourOne](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/d-id-vs-elai-vs-hourone.html): AI avatar platforms compared for corporate training and presentations.
- [Best Free AI Video Generators 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/best-free-ai-video-generators-2026.html): Top free-tier AI video tools with no credit card required.
- [AI Video Pricing Compared 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/ai-video-pricing-compared-2026.html): Side-by-side pricing breakdown for 10 major AI video platforms.
- [Sora Alternatives 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/sora-alternatives-2026.html): 10 best alternatives after OpenAI Sora shuts down April 26, 2026.
- [Best AI Video Tools for Beginners 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/best-ai-video-tools-beginners-2026.html): Beginner's guide to choosing AI video tools with top 5 picks for new creators.

## Guides & Tutorials (6)

- [How to Create AI Videos with HeyGen](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/how-to-create-ai-videos-heygen.html): Step-by-step tutorial from account setup to final export with HeyGen.
- [Turn Long Videos into Shorts with AI](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/turn-long-videos-into-shorts-ai.html): How to repurpose long-form content into TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts using AI tools.
- [AI Tools for YouTube Creators 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/ai-tools-youtube-creators-2026.html): Complete AI-powered workflow for YouTube content creation, from scripting to thumbnails.
- [AI Training & Onboarding Videos](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/ai-training-onboarding-videos.html): How to create corporate training and onboarding videos with AI avatars.
- [What Is Text-to-Video AI?](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/what-is-text-to-video-ai.html): Beginner guide explaining how AI video generation technology works and its current capabilities.
- [Best Gear for AI Video Creators 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/best-gear-ai-video-creators-2026.html): 13 recommended products including mics, webcams, lighting, and accessories for AI video creation.

## Use Cases (2)

- [AI Video for E-Commerce](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/ai-video-for-ecommerce.html): How online stores use AI video for product demos, ads, and customer engagement.
- [AI Video for Social Media Marketing](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/ai-video-social-media-marketing-2026.html): AI-powered social media video strategy, tools, and best practices for marketers.

## Tools & Resources (3)

- [AI Video Cost Calculator](https://aivideopicks.com/tools/ai-video-cost-calculator.html): Interactive calculator showing how much you can save by switching from traditional video production to AI tools. Recommends tools based on use case.
- [Compare AI Video Tools](https://aivideopicks.com/tools/compare.html): Side-by-side comparison builder — pick any 2-3 AI video tools and instantly compare pricing, features, avatars, languages, and ratings.
- [AI Video Deals & Coupons 2026](https://aivideopicks.com/posts/ai-video-deals-coupons-2026.html): Active deals, coupon codes, and free tiers for AI video tools. Updated April 2026.

## Topics Covered

- AI avatar and talking head video generation
- Text-to-video and image-to-video AI
- AI video editing and enhancement
- AI voice cloning and text-to-speech
- AI caption and subtitle generation
- Video translation and dubbing
- Short-form video repurposing
- Corporate training video creation
- AI video pricing and plan comparison
- Creator gear and recording setup recommendations
- E-commerce and social media video marketing
